heroSubtitle: Your budget. Your data. Your rules.
privacyHeading: Your data never leaves your server.
privacyBody: No company reads your finances. Actual syncs to a server you control — your home, a NAS, or a private VPS — and nowhere else.
featuresHeading: Budget the way it actually works.
featuresSubtitle: Every dollar has a job. Assign it before you spend it — not after.
cardEnvelopeBody: Assign every dollar to a category before you spend it.
cardAccountsBody: Checking, savings, credit cards — synced and balanced in one view.
cardInsightsBody: See where your money actually went — and plan better next month.
